Method that inserts data from a CSV file into the database.

Imports film data from a CSV file into the database.

Initializes the actions menu for the application.

Initializes the components and layout of the view.

Initializes the components and layout of the view.

Sets up the main application frame.
initializeMainPanel() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.MainView
Initializes the main panel of the application.

Method that creates and initializes menu items in "Actions" menu

Method that initializes menus ("Actions" and "About")

Initializes the user's movie list.
initializePanelContainer() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.MainView
Initializes the panel container for the application.
initializePanels() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FilmsView
Creates film, left and right panels by initializing the methods for these.
initializeTable() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FilmsView
Initializes the films table and adds it to the center of the layout with a scroll pane.
initializeView() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller.MyListHandler
Initializes the view by populating the table with the current MyList data.
initializeViews() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.MainView
Initializes the views used in the application.

Inserts a mapping between a film and a category into the film_category table.

insertSingleFilmFromUI() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller.ActionsHandler
Method that inserts a single film into the database using data provided by the user via the UI.
isAdultRatingSelected() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FilmsView
Checks if the "adult" rating checkbox is selected.
isChildRatingSelected() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FilmsView
Checks if the "child" rating checkbox is selected.
